Name: The Gunsmith
Active: Deal Units damage directly to target enemy ignoring Shields but not armor
Resource: Weapons cost 1 less of your choice, 1st armor purchase per round is free

Name: The Bulwark
Active: Destroy armor equipment to Convert armor on that unit into 2x that amount in shields
Resource: Armor cost 1 less of your choice, 1st armor purchase per round is free

Name: The Engineer
Active: Refresh the cooldown on target utility, ignore costs for this activation
Resource: Utilities cost 2 less of your choice

Name: The Tactician
Passives: Draw another card when using Active effects on commander cards, can play commander cards from anywhere
Active: Draw the Top command deck card and activate it for free. Once per round
Resource: effects on command cards are free for the 1st card per turn

Name: The Kingmaker
Passives: You cannot be the commander, of you would become commander make another player commander. Players you designate as commander count as you being commander for missions and objectives
Active: Once per game you can designate a new commander (Command cannot change next turn)
Resource: You can pay for other players commander cards, players you make commander draw an additional card each turn

Name: The Drillmaster
Passives: Units under Rank 5 gain Attack/HP = double your rank - Their rank
Active: Recruit the Lowest Rank unit in shop for free
Resource: Units Under rank 5 cost no alien

Name: The Specialist
Passives: You can purchase units at 1 rank higher, units over rank 5 gain +5 Attack/HP
Active: Recruit the Highest Rank unit in shop for no Alien cost
Resource: Units Over 4 rank cost half alien

Name: The Driver
Passives: Vehicles require -3 rank, other units require +1
Active: Reveal the top of the shop deck until a Vehicle is shown matching your rank, Recruit this unit for free, Shuffle the deck
Resource: Vehicles cost half Tech and Organic

Name: The Recruiter
Passives: Infantry require -2 rank, other units require +1
Active: Reveal the top of the shop deck until an Infantry is shown matching your rank, Recruit this unit for free, Shuffle the deck

Name: The Pilot
Passives: Mechs require -3 rank, other units require +1
Active: Reveal the top of the shop deck until a Mech is shown matching your rank, Recruit this unit for free, Shuffle the deck

Name: The Doctor
Passives: Medical bay heals double when your workers are placed there.
Active: Activate on Unit death, Move this unit to med bay with its equipment, this effect can stack ontop of another unit.
Resource: Gain +rank organic when collecting from the medical

Name: The Jailer
Passives: Contained enemies are not consumed while you have a worker at Containment Block
Active: Combine both units from Containment Block and move them to your lane
Resource: Containment Block upgrades Cost no alien

Name: The Reclaimer
Passives: 1st item put into recycling is returned to your hand each turn
Active: Search the Recycling for an equipment matching your rank or lower, Return this item to your hand
Resource: You can purchase equipment from Recycling at half the cost

Name: The Pathfinder
Passives: your scouts have double combat stats
Active: Once per lane prevent reveal ability on the next 2 enemies (can be used to prevent current reveal)
Resource: Scouts rank is not needed to recruit

Name: The Breaker
Passives: Units in your lane Shred on hit = your rank
Active: Remove all Shields and Armor from active enemies.
Resource: Gain Shield = armor/shields lost from enemies

Name: The Bastion
Passives: Units in your lane Shred 2 when entering combat, they also start with Shield = your rank
Active: Once per round, All Friendlies gain Shield = 10x your rank

Name: The Chessmaster
Passives: You can Reassign units at any time. Reassigned units Take half damage from their 1st hit of combat, (once per lane)
Active: Swap location of 2 enemy units, ignore reveals, they take double damage
